profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.userNameHint: Max 15 characters. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores allowed.
profile.userNameTaken: User name is already taken. Please choose another.
profile.profilePictureHint: Max size 5MB. JPEG, PNG or WEBP format.
profile.profilePictureFormatError: Invalid file format. Only JPEG, PNG, and WEBP are allowed.
profile.profilePicturePermissionMessage: Please allow access to your photos.
profile.heightHint: Used to estimate distance from steps. Leave empty to use defaults.
profile.updateError: An unexpected error occurred while saving settings.

security.title: Security Settings

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: After resetting your password, you will be logged out from all devices for security reasons. Any unsaved local data on this device may be cleared.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
resetPassword.updateFailed: Failed to update password. Please try again.
resetPassword.updateSuccess: Password updated successfully! Logging you out...

security.googleAccount: You signed in with Google. Password management is handled through your Google account.
security.guestAccount: You are signed in as a guest. Create an account to set a password.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Type "DELETE ACCOUNT" to confirm. All your data will be permanently removed and cannot be recovered.
deleteAccount.incorrectConfirmation: Incorrect confirmation text. Type "DELETE ACCOUNT" to proceed.
deleteAccount.confirmMessage: This action cannot be undone. Do you really want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.deleteSuccess: Account deleted successfully! Logging you out...
deleteAccount.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account! Please try again.

dayReset.title: Day Starts At
dayReset.description: Tracking for nutrition and habits resets at this time. Set it to an hour when you're always asleep.

pushNotifications.title: Push Notifications
pushNotifications.notifications_disabled_message: Enable notifications from your device settings to receive updates.

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.sendError: Failed to send feedback. Please try again.
feedback.maxImages: You can attach up to {{count}} images.
